embedding.apiKey.label: OpenAI API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for OpenAI embeddings (or use ${OPENAI_API_KEY})

embedding.baseUrl.label: Base URL
embedding.baseUrl.help: Base URL for compatible providers (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1)

embedding.dimensions.label: Dimensions
embedding.dimensions.help: Vector dimensions for custom models (required for non-standard models)

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context

captureMaxChars.label: Capture Max Chars
captureMaxChars.help: Maximum message length eligible for auto-capture

hybrid.enabled.label: Hybrid Search
hybrid.enabled.help: Combine vector search with BM25 keyword search for better recall

hybrid.reranker.label: Reranker
hybrid.reranker.help: Reranking algorithm: 'rrf' (Reciprocal Rank Fusion) or 'linear' (weighted combination)

hybrid.vectorWeight.label: Vector Weight
hybrid.vectorWeight.help: Weight for semantic vector search (0-1, only used with 'linear' reranker)

hybrid.textWeight.label: Text Weight
hybrid.textWeight.help: Weight for BM25 keyword search (0-1, only used with 'linear' reranker)
